name: Twistingo: Hummingbird Haven Collector's Edition
short_description: Discover the magic of nature in ‘Twistingo: Hummingbird Haven,’ a tropical adventure of puzzles and hidden objects. Rescue the hummingbirds after a storm, rebuild their homes, and revive the island. Collect amulets, play mini-games, and discover the secrets of the island.
detailed_description: Set off on a heartwarming journey in 'Twistingo: Hummingbird Haven,' where nature's beauty meets puzzle-solving fun! A solar eclipse and a storm have endangered the island's hummingbirds. Your task is to find them, rebuild their homes, and restore the island's charm. Engage in hidden object searches, complete puzzles, gather unique amulets and revel in the stories of the local community. Join this memorable quest to save Hummingbird Haven!
about_the_game: Set off on a heartwarming journey in 'Twistingo: Hummingbird Haven,' where nature's beauty meets puzzle-solving fun!
